'''Kormoran''' was an astronomical object located in [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy's]] [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]] that was a site of an Imperial attack. During the [[Attack on Kormoran|blitz]], [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE Fighters]] were sent in to clear the roads of over 90,000 refugees. After the attack, one of the TIE pilots went AWOL and joined the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebellion]]. He later became an X-wing pilot.<ref name="Trooper">{{Tales|10|Trooper (comic story)}}</ref>
